title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 407.120 - Provisions of this chapter no bar to other civil actions
text:
407.120.  Provisions of this chapter no bar to other civil actions. — The provisions of sections 407.010 to 407.130 shall not bar any civil claim against any person who has acquired any moneys or property, real or personal, by means of any practice declared to be unlawful by this chapter.
(L. 1967 p. 607 § 12, A.L. 1986 S.B. 685) 
Effective 5-01-86
